reviews.author: George Koshy
reviews.text: It was the best decision we made to buy Godrej Interio products from M Rajkamal Furniture. The owner is highly involved and cares about customer satisfaction and quick service. We were offered good deals for our purchase.

reviews.author: Supriya Satam
reviews.text: We have purchase one sofa cum bed and customise cupboard which is beautiful and perfect as we want they have provided very good services and staff is also very cooperative thank you so much for this service everything is worth it. Best shop in Dadar.

reviews.author: Indranil Gayen
reviews.text: Wonderful service by Mr. Rahul. Initially one of the parts came broken. He tried his best and arranged replacement earliest. Really helpful and polite person. We'll order again from him. Infact we found better deal than Godrej Intorio own showroom.

reviews.author: Akash Chhabra
reviews.text: I got a custom-made bed from Rajkamal Furniture, and I'm really happy with it. The bed looks great and feels strong. The staff listened to what I wanted and made sure everything was just right. They were friendly and got the bed done on time. I would definitely recommend them for your furniture needs.

reviews.author: Nilam Kokate
reviews.text: Good quality, superb look, on time delivery... Really happy with the final product.

reviews.author: Sonal Shah
reviews.text: Excellent furniture best and timely delivery. Rahul bhai is very helpful and provides end to end solutions. I recommend strongly.

reviews.author: Amol J
reviews.text: I wanted steel wardrobes, I visited this store in Dadar west. They have excellent products with modern finishing and designs. The owner himself comes to the product dimension at home and suggests you various designs and colors to suit your style and requirements. Also the behaviour of the staff and the owner was very helpful they advised and suggested with respect to my requirement and the overall room surroundings. I am very very thankful to Mr Rahul and the staff of the shop. This is a very good quality product as well as a good quality service.
